channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 35.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham pledges not to 're-run' Brexit arguments
item.description: Burnham pledges not to 're-run' Brexit arguments

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘I am not going to walk away’, says Starmer as Burnham pitches debate on ’how politics needs to change’ – UK politics live
item.description: ‘I am not going to walk away’, says Starmer as Burnham pitches debate on ’how politics needs to change’ – UK politics live

item.title: ITVX: Peston: Starmer ruling out a timetable to quit is Olympic level straw-clutching | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Peston: Starmer ruling out a timetable to quit is Olympic level straw-clutching | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham’s change in tack on fiscal rules and bond markets is understandable
item.description: Andy Burnham’s change in tack on fiscal rules and bond markets is understandable

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: As I said he would last week. The idea that Burnham is some kind of reckless socialist is really quite baffling to anyone who's followed his career.
item.description: As I said he would last week. The idea that Burnham is some kind of reckless socialist is really quite baffling to anyone who's followed his career.

item.title: Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: As I said he would last week. The idea that Burnham is some kind of reckless socialist is really quite baffling to anyone who's followed his career.
item.description: As I said he would last week. The idea that Burnham is some kind of reckless socialist is really quite baffling to anyone who's followed his career.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer’s message to voters in Makerfield: vote Labour because you hate me | John Crace
item.description: Starmer’s message to voters in Makerfield: vote Labour because you hate me | John Crace

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham left no one in doubt – he intends to be PM
item.description: Burnham left no one in doubt – he intends to be PM

item.title: Independent UK Politics: What to know about the political chaos engulfing the UK's Labour Party and efforts to unseat Starmer
item.description: What to know about the political chaos engulfing the UK's Labour Party and efforts to unseat Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Starmer will not ‘walk away’ as Burnham warns ‘big changes’ needed
item.description: Politics latest: Starmer will not ‘walk away’ as Burnham warns ‘big changes’ needed
